quote.freshnessThreshold: NOT_REQUIRED for Strategy5 A unless used by downstream frontend/ranking display
quote.coverageThreshold: NOT_REQUIRED for Strategy5 core chip publish; required only if contract enables quote freshness
quote.aGradeThreshold: If required: coverage ready and no stale priority symbols
quote.acceptableDegradedConditions: Quote diagnostics unavailable while Strategy5 chip source remains ready and fallback is explicitly disclosed as not used for publish
quote.unacceptableConditions: Quote marked required but missing/stale, or fallback quote data used without disclosure

intraday_1m.freshnessThreshold: NOT_REQUIRED for Strategy5 core chip publish
intraday_1m.coverageThreshold: NOT_REQUIRED unless MA readiness depends on intraday warmup
intraday_1m.aGradeThreshold: If required: latest candle inside allowed stale seconds and readiness >= threshold
intraday_1m.acceptableDegradedConditions: Marked NOT_REQUIRED with explicit readiness evidence
intraday_1m.unacceptableConditions: Required intraday source stale but unattendedStatus=YES

ma20_ma35.tableViewRpc: daily MA/readiness source derived from quote/daily bars
ma20_ma35.freshnessThreshold: latest trading day or explicit NOT_REQUIRED
ma20_ma35.coverageThreshold: If required: ready symbols >= strategy threshold
ma20_ma35.aGradeThreshold: MA readiness PASS or NOT_REQUIRED evidence present
ma20_ma35.acceptableDegradedConditions: MA not used by Strategy5 publish and captured as NOT_REQUIRED
ma20_ma35.unacceptableConditions: MA required but insufficient and latest pointer updated

daily_volume.tableViewRpc: daily quote/volume table or volume average view
daily_volume.freshnessThreshold: latest trading day or explicit NOT_REQUIRED
daily_volume.coverageThreshold: If required: all candidate symbols have usable volume
daily_volume.aGradeThreshold: volume readiness PASS or NOT_REQUIRED evidence present
daily_volume.acceptableDegradedConditions: Not used for core Strategy5 publish and disclosed
daily_volume.unacceptableConditions: Volume required but blank counts hidden or latest overwritten

preopen.freshnessThreshold: same trading day if preopen contract required; otherwise NOT_REQUIRED
preopen.coverageThreshold: If required: snapshot coverage above strategy threshold
preopen.aGradeThreshold: preopen readiness PASS or NOT_REQUIRED evidence present
preopen.acceptableDegradedConditions: Preopen not required for Strategy5 post-close chip scan
preopen.unacceptableConditions: Preopen required but stale/missing and unattendedStatus=YES

futopt_txf.freshnessThreshold: same trading day if required; otherwise NOT_REQUIRED
futopt_txf.aGradeThreshold: futopt/TXF PASS or NOT_REQUIRED evidence present
futopt_txf.acceptableDegradedConditions: Not part of Strategy5 chip publish and explicitly NOT_REQUIRED
futopt_txf.unacceptableConditions: Required TXF stale but latest published

chip_institutional.aGradeThreshold: coverageStatus=ready, sourceStatus=ready, complete run readable, result readback equals resultCount, field blankCounts all zero
chip_institutional.acceptableDegradedConditions: None for publish; degraded must block latest and preserve previous good
chip_institutional.unacceptableConditions: HTTP 522/timeout, missing latest run, zero result, incomplete scan, stale chip source, fallback used, readback mismatch

warrant.aGradeThreshold: NOT_REQUIRED evidence if included in global scorecard
warrant.acceptableDegradedConditions: Warrant chain degraded without affecting Strategy5 publish
warrant.unacceptableConditions: Global scorecard claims full unattended while warrant critical chain fails

cb.aGradeThreshold: NOT_REQUIRED evidence if included in global scorecard
cb.acceptableDegradedConditions: CB degraded without affecting Strategy5 publish
cb.unacceptableConditions: Global scorecard claims full unattended while CB critical chain fails

scorecard.tableViewRpc: scorecard source snapshot / scorecard no-rollback verifier
scorecard.freshnessThreshold: same expected scorecard date after due window
scorecard.aGradeThreshold: no rollback, all strategy records present, source markers valid
scorecard.acceptableDegradedConditions: Scorecard stale preserves previous complete run and emits blocker
scorecard.unacceptableConditions: candidate missing strategies, stale scorecard published as current, Strategy3 marker mismatch

mobile_frontend.freshnessThreshold: snapshot fresh under frontend cache policy
mobile_frontend.coverageThreshold: all required endpoints present unless explicitly soft-fallback
mobile_frontend.aGradeThreshold: snapshotHit=true, snapshotFresh=true, partial=false, endpoint count complete
mobile_frontend.acceptableDegradedConditions: Previous complete snapshot preserved when refresh is partial
mobile_frontend.unacceptableConditions: partial or empty frontend bundle presented as full unattended

recoveryCommandsDoNotRunNow.expectedPASS: exit 0 twice, no HTTP 522/timeout, latency inside incident-exit threshold
chip coverage ready, institutionalRows and validAfterExclusionRows >= 1500, source age <= 3d
latest complete run readable, result readback equals resultCount, returned rows non-empty
replay produces non-empty candidates and does not write latest
all Strategy5 A gates pass, no global blocker used to claim overall YES

quoteCoverageLow.refillMethod: restore official quote writer and backfill missing priority symbols only
quoteCoverageLow.rateLimit: respect provider throttle; exponential backoff on 429/5xx
quoteCoverageLow.retry: 3 attempts with jitter, then blocked receipt
quoteCoverageLow.stopCondition: coverage threshold met or provider errors persist
quoteCoverageLow.successCriteria: required quote coverage ready and no stale priority symbols

intraday1mMissing.refillMethod: backfill latest 1m candles for strategy universe
intraday1mMissing.recentBarsNeeded: at least MA warmup window plus latest session bars
intraday1mMissing.maReadinessThreshold: MA20/MA35 readiness PASS for required universe
intraday1mMissing.successCriteria: latest candle fresh and readiness view PASS

dailyVolumeMissing.successCriteria: volume and avg volume populated for all required candidate symbols

futoptTxfMissing.successCriteria: same-day TXF/futopt readiness PASS or explicit NOT_REQUIRED for Strategy5

preopenMissing.snapshotRequirement: same trading day snapshot with capturedAt and coverage evidence
preopenMissing.successCriteria: preopen PASS or explicit NOT_REQUIRED evidence for Strategy5

recoveryOrder: wait 5-10 minutes and run npm run supabase:probe:light again
